data.title: Encryption
data.description: Advanced encryption protocols to protect data both in transit and at rest.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against distributed denial-of-service attacks to ensure service availability.
data.technical_spec: Adaptive filtering, centralized scrubbing centers, regional load balancing

data.title: Authentication
data.description: Robust authentication systems to protect user accounts and data.

data.title: Vulnerability scanning
data.description: Continuous scanning for vulnerabilities in the codebase and infrastructure.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning tools, Bug Bounty Program, regular security audits

data.title: Data Loss Prevention
data.description: Strategies to prevent data leakage or unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Cloud DLP API, access control policies, data anonymization tools
